title: Master Direction – Reporting under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (ECB Framework Amendment)
description: <cite index="1-13,1-14">The RBI issued the Foreign Exchange Management (Borrowing and Lending) (First Amendment) Regulations, 2026 dated February 09, 2026, for revising the External Commercial Borrowing (ECB) Framework. The forms for returns pertaining to ECB, prescribed under the Master Direction, have been modified in light of the revised ECB Framework.</cite>
